info.name: Chat & Notifications API
info.description:
# Chat & Notifications API

Complete API documentation for the **Chat** and **Notification** modules of the Carpooling Backend.

## Base URL
```
http://localhost:3000/api/v1
```

## Authentication
All endpoints require a valid JWT token in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

---

## Architecture Overview

### Chat Module
- **REST APIs** → For data fetching (conversation list, message history, unread count)
- **WebSocket Events** → For real-time messaging (send/receive messages, typing indicators, read/delivery receipts)
- Chat is **only available** between a rider and driver who have a **CONFIRMED** booking.

### Notification Module
- **REST APIs** → For fetching notifications, marking as read, managing device tokens
- **WebSocket Events** → Server pushes `notification:new` in real-time when user is online
- **Push Notifications** → FCM/APNs for offline users (automatic, no API needed)

---

## WebSocket Connection

Connect to Socket.IO:
```
const socket = io('http://localhost:3000', {
  auth: { token: '<access_token>' }
});
```

### On Connection:
- Server automatically syncs any **undelivered messages** via `chat:sync` event
- Server sets user as **online** in presence system

### On Disconnect:
- If no other sockets remain for the user, server marks user as **offline**

item.name: 📨 Chat — REST APIs
item.description:
REST endpoints for the Chat module.

Base path: `/api/v1/chat`

All endpoints require authentication via Bearer token.

query.description: UUID of the last conversation from previous page (for cursor-based pagination)
Number of conversations to return (1–50, default: 20)
UUID of the last message from previous page (for pagination)
Number of messages to return (1–100, default: 30)

request.description:
Get paginated message history for a specific conversation.

Messages are returned in **descending order** (newest first).

The authenticated user must be a participant in the conversation.

### Path Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `conversationId` | UUID | The conversation ID |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Messages fetched successfully",
  "data": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "id": "msg-uuid",
        "conversationId": "conv-uuid",
        "senderId": "user-uuid",
        "receiverId": "user-uuid-2",
        "type": "TEXT",
        "text": "Hey! Are you on the way?",
        "payloadJson": null,
        "clientMsgId": "client-123",
        "deliveredAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:05Z",
        "readAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:10Z",
        "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
      }
    ],
    "nextCursor": "msg-uuid-last",
    "hasMore": false
  }
}
```

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 404 | Conversation not found or you are not a participant |

Send a text message via REST API.

> **Note:** Prefer using the WebSocket `chat:send` event for real-time messaging. This REST endpoint is a **fallback** when the WebSocket connection is unavailable.

> For **images**, use `POST /chat/send-image`. For **locations**, use `POST /chat/send-location`.

### Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `receiverId` | UUID | ✅ | User ID of the message recipient |
| `text` | string | ✅ | Message text (1–5000 chars) |
| `clientMsgId` | string | ✅ | Client-generated unique ID for idempotency |
| `type` | string | ❌ | Message type: `TEXT`, `IMAGE`, `FILE`, `LOCATION`, `SYSTEM` (default: `TEXT`) |
| `payloadJson` | object | ❌ | Additional metadata (for IMAGE/FILE/LOCATION types) |

### Prerequisites
- Sender and receiver must have a **CONFIRMED** booking between them
- Cannot send a message to yourself

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Message sent successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "msg-uuid",
    "conversationId": "conv-uuid",
    "senderId": "your-uuid",
    "receiverId": "receiver-uuid",
    "type": "TEXT",
    "text": "Hello! I'll be at the pickup point in 5 minutes.",
    "clientMsgId": "client-msg-unique-id-123",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 400 | You cannot send a message to yourself |
| 400 | Text is required for text messages |
| 403 | Chat is only available after a booking is confirmed between rider and driver |

formdata.description: Image file (JPG, PNG, or WEBP — max 5 MB)
Optional caption for the image (max 5000 chars)

request.description:
Send an image message via multipart form upload.

The image is uploaded to **S3** and the resulting URL is stored in the message's `payloadJson`.

### Form Data Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `image` | file | ✅ | Image file (JPG, PNG, or WEBP — max 5 MB) |
| `receiverId` | UUID | ✅ | User ID of the message recipient |
| `clientMsgId` | string | ✅ | Client-generated unique ID for idempotency |
| `text` | string | ❌ | Optional image caption (max 5000 chars) |

### Prerequisites
- Sender and receiver must have a **CONFIRMED** booking between them
- Cannot send a message to yourself

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Image message sent successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "msg-uuid",
    "conversationId": "conv-uuid",
    "senderId": "your-uuid",
    "receiverId": "receiver-uuid",
    "type": "IMAGE",
    "text": "Check this out!",
    "payloadJson": {
      "imageUrl": "https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/uploads/chat/uuid.jpg",
      "mimeType": "image/jpeg",
      "fileSize": 245760
    },
    "clientMsgId": "img-client-msg-001",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### Conversation Preview
Image messages show as `📷 Image` (or `📷 {caption}` if a caption is provided) in the conversation list.

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 400 | Image file is required |
| 400 | Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are allowed |
| 400 | You cannot send a message to yourself |
| 403 | Chat is only available after a booking is confirmed |
| 500 | Failed to upload image |

body.raw:
{
  "receiverId": "{{receiver_id}}",
  "clientMsgId": "loc-client-msg-001",
  "latitude": 28.6139,
  "longitude": 77.2090,
  "address": "India Gate, New Delhi",
  "placeId": "ChIJLbZ-NFoaDTkRQCY_aBYIFY8",
  "text": "I'm here at India Gate"
}

request.description:
Send a location pin as a chat message.

Useful for sharing pickup/drop-off points, or current location during a ride.

### Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `receiverId` | UUID | ✅ | User ID of the message recipient |
| `clientMsgId` | string | ✅ | Client-generated unique ID for idempotency |
| `latitude` | number | ✅ | Latitude (-90 to 90) |
| `longitude` | number | ✅ | Longitude (-180 to 180) |
| `address` | string | ❌ | Human-readable address (max 500 chars) |
| `placeId` | string | ❌ | Google Places ID (max 255 chars) |
| `text` | string | ❌ | Optional text message (max 5000 chars) |

### Prerequisites
- Sender and receiver must have a **CONFIRMED** booking between them
- Cannot send a message to yourself

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Location message sent successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "msg-uuid",
    "conversationId": "conv-uuid",
    "senderId": "your-uuid",
    "receiverId": "receiver-uuid",
    "type": "LOCATION",
    "text": "I'm here at India Gate",
    "payloadJson": {
      "latitude": 28.6139,
      "longitude": 77.2090,
      "address": "India Gate, New Delhi",
      "placeId": "ChIJLbZ-NFoaDTkRQCY_aBYIFY8"
    },
    "clientMsgId": "loc-client-msg-001",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### Conversation Preview
Location messages show as `📍 Location` (or `📍 {text}` if text is provided) in the conversation list.

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 400 | You cannot send a message to yourself |
| 400 | Valid latitude and longitude are required |
| 403 | Chat is only available after a booking is confirmed |

Mark all messages in a conversation as read up to (and including) the specified message.

### Path Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `conversationId` | UUID | The conversation ID |

### Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `lastReadMessageId` | UUID | ✅ | Mark all messages up to this message as read |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Messages marked as read"
}
```

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 404 | Message not found |

item.name: 🔔 Notifications — REST APIs
item.description:
REST endpoints for the Notification module.

Base path: `/api/v1/notifications`

All endpoints require authentication via Bearer token.

query.description: UUID of the last notification from previous page (for cursor-based pagination)
Number of notifications to return (1–50, default: 20)

request.description:
Mark specific notifications as read.

### Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `notificationIds` | UUID[] | ✅ | Array of notification IDs to mark as read (1–100 items) |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Notifications marked as read",
  "data": {
    "markedCount": 3
  }
}
```

Register a device token for push notifications (FCM/APNs).

Upserts — if the token already exists, updates the associated user and `lastSeenAt`.

### Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `platform` | string | ✅ | Device platform: `android` or `ios` |
| `token` | string | ✅ | FCM/APNs device token from Firebase SDK |

### Response (201)
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Device registered successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "device-token-uuid",
    "userId": "user-uuid",
    "platform": "android",
    "token": "fcm-device-token...",
    "lastSeenAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z",
    "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### When to Call
- On **app startup** (every time the app opens)
- After **FCM token refresh** event
- After **user login**

Remove a device token to stop receiving push notifications on this device.

### Path Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `tokenId` | UUID | The device token record ID (from register response) |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Device removed successfully"
}
```

### When to Call
- On **user logout**
- When user **disables push notifications**

### Errors
| Status | Message |
|---|---|
| 404 | Device token not found |

item.name: ⚡ Chat — WebSocket Events
🔔 Notifications — WebSocket Events
item.description:
## WebSocket Events for Real-time Notifications

Notifications are delivered via WebSocket when the user is **online**. If the user is **offline**, they are sent as **push notifications** via FCM/APNs automatically.

No client action is needed to receive these — just listen for the event.
